rows.label: qev087501_MSG0001
rows.name: Mustache man delivery![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087501_MSG0002
rows.name:
Whew! I am BEAT. Mind
if I relax here a bit?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087501_MSG0003
rows.name:
Sure, just don't make it a
habit, okay? We can't have
the Home become your day spa.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087501_MSG0004
rows.name:
Hey, can't a commander stop by
now and then to check on how
his favorite team is doin'?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087501_MSG0005
rows.name: THAT'S why I'm REALLY here, ya know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087501_MSG0006
rows.name: Mustache man worse liar than even Tatsu.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087501_MSG0007
rows.name:
Real reason for visit is
for Lin-san's cooking![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087501_MSG0008
rows.name:
Ho, the dinner roll ain't
as dumb as he looks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087501_MSG0009
rows.name: Why, thank you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087501_MSG0010
rows.name:
Tatsu, I don't think
that was a compliment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087501_MSG0011
rows.name:
I'm not sure food helps Blue
Bloods with fatigue, Commander.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087501_MSG0012
rows.name: Comfort food helps everything, Lin.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087501_MSG0013
rows.name:
I just need something to take
my mind off this weapon R&D
work. It's driving me nuts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087501_MSG0014
rows.name: Weapon R&D?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087501_MSG0015
rows.name:
Can I get in on that, sir?
I'd love to help out![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087501_MSG0016
rows.name:
Ah, right. I shoulda figured
this'd be right up your alley.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087501_MSG0017
rows.name: Up my alley? It IS my alley![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087501_MSG0018
rows.name: All right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087501_MSG0018_2
rows.name:
Let's call it a personal job from
me. Frankly, I'd love the advice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087501_MSG0019
rows.name: Understood.[ST:wait ]
